response.justification: Despite extensive experience as a senior software developer, the candidate lacks demonstrated Java proficiency in recent roles, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and is significantly overqualified for an entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, retention, and alignment with junior responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
No recent Java work shown; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
Senior-level experience suggests misalignment with junior role expectations and salary band
